name: 球桌教學＋身體接觸
name_en: Pool table tutorial with physical contact
description: 生日派對上男主教女主打撞球，手把手指導動作，製造自然的身體接觸和曖昧氛圍。旁觀者的議論強化了這個場景的CP感。
tags: 近距離身體接觸的曖昧＋公開場合的親密行為引發圍觀和議論

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: Focus on the ball. Put your index finger here. Your thumb goes here. Do I look good? / Oh my goodness. Could it be that Ryan is also into Miss Beauty?
